phase_6_summary.notes: Component-driven development without a master scroll storyboard led to disjointed pacing. User brought in a complete structural Master Design Director critique.

notes: CONTEXT HYGIENE APPLIED. Sections 1 and 2 are complete and verified. The structural GSAP/Lenis issues with the Preloader have been fixed. The next session MUST focus exclusively on Section 3: The Philosophy Bridge.
key_decisions: Adopted a new 6-section emotional arc architecture (xbd_homepage_architecture.md) as the absolute source of truth.
Discarded previous fragmented plans and context files.
Transition format changed to a fixed WebGL simplex shader overlay that unmounts completely after an event-triggered GSAP dissolve timeline.
Implemented optical centering for logo and pure white text with dark charcoal shadow for optimal contrast against bright assets.
Implemented a hard lock on ReactLenis during the Preloader dissolve to prevent scroll event bleeding into the Hero section.
blockers: Awaiting project photographs for Disciplines and Team portraits.
